_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in testing for bias in data sets and AI system outputs as well as determining historically or often underrepresented and marginalized groups are properly represented in the training, testing, and validation data sets and AI system outputs.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing bias audits for AI systems, including test dataset construction, metric selection, results interpretation, and remediation recommendation.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI AG domain. AG-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-T-009 (AG, cosine: 0.560), AG-K-007 (AG, cosine: 0.552).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.668). Shared vocabulary: [ai, bias, skill]. DCWF-only terms [data, determining, groups, historically, marginalized, often] vs WIDAI-only terms [audits, construction, dataset, designing, executing, interpretation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.866, R=0.878). Balanced P/R — the 38-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in testing for bias in data sets and AI system outputs as well as determin" and "Skill in designing and executing bias audits for AI systems, including test data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.673 ≈ STS 0.668 (gap 0.005). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, bias, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [ai, bias, skill]. DCWF-only: [data, determining, groups, historically, marginalized, often]. WIDAI-only: [audits, construction, dataset, designing, executing, interpretation].
